name: Data Register — External API Endpoint
summary: Populate a dropdown with data from an external REST API using a URL register
whenToUse: Dropdown lists whose values come from a third-party API or external system
When the data source is not in the ADSP Configuration Service
notes: Use `options.register.url` for external REST API endpoints that return JSON arrays
The `objectPathInArray` property specifies which JSON property to use as the dropdown label and value
For example, if the API returns `[{"codigo": "1", "nome": "Acura"}]`, use `objectPathInArray: "nome"`
Set `enum: [""]` as a placeholder in the data schema — the actual values are loaded from the API
Requires the JsonFormRegisterProvider context wrapper in the React integration
